overall.description: First-person cockpit view from an AS350 helicopter flying over hazy coastal waters during golden hour, approaching and flying over a coastal urban area while executing a continuous right turn. Game engine footage from a flight simulator.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water approach to hazy coastline

events.description: helicopter begins gentle right bank toward the coastline
industrial structures on distant coastline become visible through haze

agents.ego_description: piloting helicopter over calm waters toward a distant coastline in hazy golden hour conditions

entered.detail: AS350 helicopter instrument cluster with flight gauges and GPS display
calm sea surface reflecting golden hour light
distant coastline visible through atmospheric haze
thick golden-tinted haze reducing visibility throughout the scene

segments.scene_description: The helicopter flies over calm waters toward a distant coastline bathed in golden hour light. The instrument panel is visible in the foreground while a thick atmospheric haze obscures the horizon. The pilot begins a gentle right bank as industrial structures become visible on the approaching shore.

events.description: helicopter increases right bank angle, revealing more of the coastline
view shifts from open water to industrial port facilities and storage tanks

agents.ego_description: executing right turn while approaching the coastline, revealing industrial port facilities and harbor structures

entered.detail: industrial buildings, storage tanks, and port infrastructure along the coastline
tall crane structures visible at the port facility

segments.scene_description: The helicopter banks right, bringing the coastal industrial zone into clear view. Port facilities, storage tanks, and harbor cranes become visible as the aircraft turns. The water surface shifts to the left of the frame while the coastline moves to center view through the persistent haze.

events.description: helicopter flies over land transitioning from industrial to residential areas
continuing right turn with urban landscape passing below

agents.ego_description: completing right turn while flying over coastal cityscape with residential buildings and streets visible below

entered.detail: dense residential buildings and street grid of the coastal city
distant hills and elevated terrain beyond the urban area

segments.scene_description: The helicopter continues its right turn over the coastal city, transitioning from industrial port facilities to residential neighborhoods. The urban street grid and buildings pass below while the water recedes to the left rear. Distant hills become visible on the right as the aircraft completes its turn over the hazy cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit view that transitions from a flight over hazy open waters to a sweeping turn over a coastal urban landscape. It begins with the helicopter gliding toward a distant shoreline bathed in golden hour light, with the instrument panel visible in the foreground as a thick atmospheric haze obscures the horizon. As the aircraft initiates a gentle right bank, the scene shifts to reveal a coastal industrial zone filled with port facilities, storage tanks, and harbor cranes. The camera then continues its rightward arc, moving away from the water and gliding over a dense urban street grid and residential neighborhoods. Finally, the view expands to reveal distant hills on the right as the helicopter completes its turn over the hazy cityscape.
